'''Dela III''', also known as '''Dela''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]], a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==Description==
Dela was the financial center of the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]] and the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Ulorin]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. Those who stayed for long periods of [[Time/Legends|time]] in the [[Oseon asteroid belt|Oseon Belt]] often had an account at one of the [[Bank/Legends|banks]] of Dela.<ref name="ACGttC" />

{{Planet-stub}}
